message.content:
It looks like there might have been an error with the request. However, looking at verse Acts 9:3 again ("And as he journeyed, he came near Damascus: and suddenly there shined round about him a light from heaven:"), I can identify **Damascus** is explicitly named in this passage.

There don't appear to be other places mentioned within that specific line.

function.name: places_for_passage
function.description: List the places named in a Bible passage. Use this when the user asks where something happened. Takes a verse reference like 'Acts 9:3'.

message.content:
The place named in Acts 9:3 is **Damascus**, which was described as a settlement (approximately modern-day Damascus). 

This verse tells the story of Paul's journey to Damascus when he encountered what would become known as his conversion experience on the road. The light from heaven blinded him and led to his encounter with Jesus Christ.
